factors.summary: The company has not provided forward guidance in the given text.

factors.summary: Management's confidence is reflected in their stock repurchase activities.

evidence.text: In the first quarter of 2019, 587,988 shares were repurchased under the Non-Discretionary Stock Repurchase Plan and 500,000 shares under the Discretionary Stock Repurchase Plan.
